queries.name: query_a
queries.query: is:pr is:merged language:Python ("python 3" OR py3 OR "py2" OR "python2")

queries.name: query_b
queries.query: is:pr is:merged language:Python ("drop python 2" OR "remove python 2" OR "python 3 compatibility" OR "port to python 3")

queries.name: query_c
queries.query: is:pr is:merged language:Python (six OR 2to3 OR futurize OR xrange OR iteritems OR unicode OR bytes)

queries.name: query_d
queries.query: is:pr is:merged ("rewrite in python" OR "port to python" OR "convert to python")

queries.name: query_e
queries.query: is:pr is:merged ("c++ to python" OR "from c++ to python" OR "replace c++ with python")

queries.name: query_f
queries.query: is:pr is:merged (cython OR pybind OR binding)
